summary: OpenRTB Macros feature fully verified. Backend API returns 61 macros organized by 12 categories. Frontend displays Macros Reference button in Creative Editor Impression Pixels section with dialog showing all categories and click-to-copy functionality.

issues: Console warning: nested div inside p tag in recent activity section - minor HTML structure issue (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: OPENRTB_MACROS dict in openrtb_handler.py correctly defines 61 macros with descriptions
replace_macros() function properly extracts values from bid_request, bid_response, campaign, and creative objects
GET /api/creatives/macros endpoint correctly organizes macros into 12 categories
CreativeEditor.jsx correctly implements Macros Reference button with loadMacros() function
Dialog displays all categories with macro names, descriptions, and click-to-copy functionality
Macro replacement is integrated into OpenRTBResponseBuilder.build_response() for impression pixel URLs
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing creatives and campaigns
context_for_next_testing_agent: OpenRTB Macros feature is complete. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_openrtb_macros.py can be used for regression testing. The Macros Reference dialog is accessible from /creative-editor page in the Impression Pixels section.

tests_passed.test: All 12 categories present: auction, creative, campaign, site_app, publisher, device, geo, user, ssp, timestamp, utility, click
Each macro has name and description
Macros Reference button visible in Impression Pixels section
Clicking button opens OpenRTB Macros Reference dialog
Dialog shows example usage URL with macros
All macro categories displayed with macros and descriptions
Function replaces auction macros (AUCTION_ID, AUCTION_PRICE, etc.)
Function replaces device/geo macros from bid request
Macro replacement integrated into bid response generation
